source_label: Wikipedia — Elo rating system (footnote: written as "Elo", not "ELO"; /ˈiːloʊ/ or /ˈɛloʊ/)
notes: The rating scale behind LMArena / Chatbot Arena leaderboards, cited as "Elo score" in most 2025-2026 model launch posts and eval blogs. It is the surname of Hungarian-American physics professor Arpad Elo (né Élő), not an acronym — Wikipedia states it is "written as 'Elo', not 'ELO'" — so spelling it out as letters E-L-O is the common mistake. Both EE-loh and EL-oh are accepted in English, with EE-loh listed first by Wikipedia and Wiktionary.
